CE1.justification: Acted directly; the AGENTS.md reads were agent-side context, not asks of the user.

CE2.justification: Terse single-sentence final response that answers the routing question, names the followup, and gives the reason without filler.

CE3.justification: Stated where (resources/prompt-cache-attacks-tldr.md) and why (flagged unverified, avoid citing the 73% on the assistant's word) in one clause.

CE4.justification: Three clean artifacts (resource stub, followup, daybook with placeholder Intent that matches the daybook convention); no half-formed state.
